subcodes.title: Words to Viscount Arawaka spoken around Nov. 1911(?)
subcodes.first_line: The religious ideal is the soul of all plans for the good of mankind... Scientific discoveries have increased material civilization. There is in existence a stupendous force, as yet, happily, undiscovered by man.
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @non-participation in politics, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization
